commands.name: history-chat-append

all_of.name: user_line
all_of.description: 記録するユーザー指示の1行

commands.description: Append one validated user line into chat-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: history-decision-append

all_of.name: decision_line
all_of.description: 記録する決定事項の1行

all_of.name: reason_line
all_of.description: 記録する決定理由の1行

commands.description: Append one validated decision/reason pair into decisions-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: history-metrics-append

all_of.name: metric_line
all_of.description: 記録する計測結果の1行

commands.description: Append one validated metrics line into metrics-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: history-rotate
commands.description: Rotate non-today sections from *-latest.md into matching *-log.md files, initialize empty latest files, and fail unless latest files end with only today's heading sections.
